overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character travels from under an overpass along a sidewalk, through a fenced corridor, and emerges into an open plaza with towering glass skyscrapers illuminated by holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban sidewalk under highway overpass

events.description: camera establishes third-person perspective following the player character
character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing street furniture and neon signs

notable_agents.action: man in red jacket walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: highway overpass with red neon 'Grave' signage
large digital billboard with bright pink neon text
zebra crossing with yellow stripes on the asphalt
gray concrete pedestrian walkway with scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive highway overpass in a futuristic city at night. The camera follows the character from behind as they walk along a concrete sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in a red jacket. Neon signs including a prominent 'Watson Whore' billboard illuminate the scene with pink and cyan light, while cars pass by on the street to the left.

events.description: entering fenced corridor with metal security barrier on the left side
passing into a darker shadowed section under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway next to a metal fence, with graffiti-covered walls on the right

entered.detail: black metal security fence with vertical bars separating sidewalk from street
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a more enclosed corridor with a metal fence on the left and a graffiti-covered wall on the right. The space feels narrower and more tunnel-like under the overpass. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed as the character progresses, with distant skyscrapers becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with towering corporate skyscrapers

events.description: exiting the fenced corridor into an open plaza with massive skyscrapers visible ahead
camera pans upward to reveal the full height of the illuminated glass towers
approaching a crosswalk with moderate vehicle traffic passing by

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection while looking up at the massive illuminated skyscrapers ahead

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead toward the crosswalk in the same direction as ego

entered.detail: towering futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
street sign with green neon text indicating Palm View
multiple floating holographic advertisements with bright neon colors

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the fenced corridor into a vast open plaza dominated by enormous glass skyscrapers piercing the night sky. The camera pans upward to emphasize the scale of the corporate towers. Holographic advertisements float above the street, and the character approaches a crosswalk with moderate traffic passing by. The atmosphere shifts from enclosed and gritty to open and awe-inspiring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty urban underpass that gradually opens into a sprawling, high-tech corporate plaza. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, following a character along a concrete sidewalk illuminated by pink and cyan neon signs and the glow of a Watson Whore billboard. As the character progresses, the environment narrows into a shadowed, tunnel-like corridor enclosed by a metal fence and graffiti-covered walls. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the enclosure into a vast open plaza, where the camera pans upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers piercing the night sky. Finally, the atmosphere shifts from enclosed and gritty to awe-inspiring as holographic advertisements float above the street and the character approaches a busy city crosswalk.
